examples.title: Simple TDD Example Pattern
examples.description: Demonstrates the Red-Green-Refactor cycle with a simple login validation
examples.explanation: Shows the three phases of TDD: 1) Write a test that fails (Red), 2) Write minimal code to make it pass (Green), 3) Refactor for better design (Refactor)

examples.title: User Story Template
examples.description: Standard format for writing user stories in XP
examples.explanation: User Stories follow the format 'As a [who], I want [what], so that [why]' to capture requirements from user perspective with clear acceptance criteria

examples.title: Pair Programming Rotation
examples.description: Pseudocode showing how pair rotation might work in XP team
examples.explanation: Demonstrates how XP teams rotate pairs to ensure knowledge sharing and prevent any single point of failure while maintaining continuous collaboration
